name: cross-dex-trade
description: CROSS Chain (id 612055) Gametoken orderbook DEX trading via EOA + viem. Limit buy/sell with lot-size pre-flight, market-buy (CROSS-spend semantics via submitBuyMarket), and cancel; every trade emits a fill block (filled/partial/open/reverted) derived from base/native balance diffs. Optionally dispatched through an OpenClaw agent. Bundles a Node.js trader, SOUL.md template, and credential-handling rules.
